name: field
hints: A field with a dome, tiny holes in the ground, and a gem. All compass directions lead to warps.
GET GEM. The tiny holes are suspicious - something lives underground. DIG to investigate.
GET GEM (treasure). DIG creates a hole below (room 10). The tiny holes are where bees or ants come from. All compass directions warp to room 17. GO DOME returns inside.
Collect the gem and DIG to access the hole below. Avoid compass directions. The tiny holes may be ant holes.
notes: Field with dome, tiny holes, and *Gem*. DIG creates hole to room 10 below (drops items). All compass directions warp to room 17. GO DOME returns to tunnel (room 5). Tiny holes may be ant holes (Ant-Man reference).
